sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53327" key="karhba/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰρηβᾰ´ρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heaviness in the head</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">headache</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.</author> </bibl> Hist.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
